Cell discovered by Robert Hooke (1665); Living cells observed by Leeuwenhoek (1674).
Cell Theory: Schleiden & Schwann (1839); Rudolf Virchow added 'Omnis cellula e cellula' (1855).
Mitochondria = Powerhouse of Cell (ATP production); contains 70S ribosomes and circular DNA.
Ribosomes = Protein Factories (70S in prokaryotes, 80S in eukaryotes; non-membrane bound).
Golgi Apparatus = Traffic Police / Post Office of the Cell (Dictyosome in plants).
Mature Mammalian RBCs and Plant Sieve Tube cells lack a nucleus.
